title: Rename device - Renamed, Home screen
scenario: Renamed device name in Device Settings > General is not reflected on the Home screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and note the current device name displayed.
3. Tap on the device name or the gear icon to enter Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, tap on General.
5. Locate the device name field and rename the device to a new name (e.g., "My Poly Headset").
6. Confirm or save the new name.
7. Navigate back to the Home screen.
expected: The Home screen should display the renamed device name (e.g., "My Poly Headset").
